name: Replay Relay
short_description: A menu-bar share lane for turning game clips, screenshots, and quick notes into send-ready handoffs without Finder hopping.
audience: Players who share clips with friends
People moving game captures into chat fast
detail_lines: Stages the latest screenshot or a dropped clip with one note field and one destination choice.
Keeps rename, caption, copy-path, and reveal actions close to the menu bar so sharing starts without a Finder cleanup pass.
Focuses on the send-ready handoff instead of becoming another media library or editor.
